description: Crafted for the woman who never compromises on style and comfort, this trendy sandal from carlton london makes for a fab addition to your wardrobe. With a sleek design and simple silhouette it looks great with all kinds of clothing.Heel: 2.5"UpperLather upper with colourful straps on the forefoot with diamon-shaped cut outs, and has a backfoot strapForefoot and backfoot strap joined together by an elasticated band to offer a custom FitPadded synthetic leather footbed OutsoleDurable PU outsole with designs, check and horizontal grooves on the forefoot and horizontal grooves on the heel for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
